sections.core: Baseline program costs every popup season needs — coordinator, transport, storage, and reusable backdrop hardware.
sections.registry: Sponsor-funded popup stories — lantern backdrops, craft station, creator lane, and family portraits. Pick the experience you want to own.
sections.tiers: Recognition levels based on your total sponsorship. Benefits are social media and onsite banner — no stage speeches.
sections.options: Deployment extras that stack on funded registry stories — one popup day or an extra craft session.
